IsoDuration.description: ISO 8601 duration with at least one component. Rejects bare 'P'/'PT' and time components without the 'T' separator.

Cid.description: Arky content id: multibase('z', base58btc) of multihash(sha2-256, JCS canonical bytes). NOTE: this is NOT an IPFS CID. The leading 'z' is the multibase prefix; the remaining characters are the base58btc-encoded multihash (0x12 0x20 <32-byte digest>), which happens to render starting with 'Qm'. Example: zQmYuqg7YHoweWnuw86L5hY7xxhh9zhPW8z6VxGvJgn7RMC

JwsCompact.description: JWS compact serialization with a DETACHED payload (RFC 7515 / RFC 7797 b64:false): '<protected_header>..<signature>'. The middle (payload) segment is empty because the signed content is the artifact's own JCS canonical bytes, not re-embedded.
